name: Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour and brown sugar. Cut in butter to make a crumb mixture. Stir in nuts.
2. Set aside 3/4 cup of this mixture for topping.
3. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of an 8x8x1 1/2 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Cool slightly.
5. In a large mixer bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, pumpkin, eggs, cinnamon, allspice, and vanilla. Blend until smooth.
6. Pour over the baked crust. Sprinkle with reserved topping.
7. Bake an additional 30 to 35 minutes. Cool before cutting into 1x2 bars.
